examples: We are talking about a multi-deity society.
The "simple faith in the Deity" expressed in my teenage essay has faded over the years.
What are we to make of the incredible similarity of Israel's deity and cult to those of her neighbors?
Over the next several months, my certainty of a sentient, omnipotent and omnibenevolent deity faded steadily.
Nearby, the Shiva temple is decorated with pillars carved with images of the deity.
